glosses.ja: いら立たせる; 刺激する

translations.it: Questo rumore mi dà davvero fastidio.
translations.zh-Hans: 这个噪音真的让我很烦。
translations.yue: 呢啲噪音真係令我好煩。
translations.tr: Bu gürültü beni gerçekten rahatsız ediyor.
translations.vi: Tiếng ồn này thực sự làm tôi khó chịu.
translations.hi: यह शोर मुझे सच में परेशान करता है.
translations.el: Αυτός ο θόρυβος πραγματικά με ενοχλεί.
translations.sv: Det här ljudet irriterar mig verkligen.
translations.ja: この騒音は本当にイライラします。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner (masculine singular) introducing the noun 'bruit'; used before a consonant.
Common noun (masculine singular) functioning as the subject of the clause.
Finite verb (présent de l'indicatif, 3rd person singular) agreeing with 'Ce bruit'; includes the elided clitic object pronoun 'm'' (= 'me') preceding a vowel-initial verb.
Adverb of degree/intensity modifying the verb phrase, reinforcing the statement.

sentences.target: Tu irrites ton frère avec tes cris.
sentences.reading: /ty i.ʁit tɔ̃ fʁɛʁ avɛk te kʁi/

translations.fr: Tu irrites ton frère avec tes cris.
translations.ipa: /ty i.ʁit tɔ̃ fʁɛʁ avɛk te kʁi/
translations.en: You annoy your brother with your shouting.
translations.es: Molestas a tu hermano con tus gritos.
translations.de: Du nervst deinen Bruder mit deinem Geschrei.
translations.it: Dai fastidio a tuo fratello con le tue urla.
translations.ko: 너는 소리를 질러서 동생을 짜증나게 해.
translations.zh-Hans: 你大喊大叫惹你兄弟生气。
translations.yue: 你大嗌搞到你兄弟好煩。
translations.ru: Ты раздражаешь своего брата своими криками.
translations.pt: Você irrita seu irmão com seus gritos.
translations.he: אתה מעצבן את אחיך בצעקות שלך.
translations.vi: Bạn la hét làm anh/em trai của bạn khó chịu.
translations.nl: Je irriteert je broer met je geschreeuw.
translations.uk: Ти дратуєш свого брата своїми криками.
translations.hi: तुम अपनी चीख-पुकार से अपने भाई को परेशान करते हो.
translations.el: Ενοχλείς τον αδελφό σου με τις φωνές σου.
translations.nb: Du irriterer broren din med skrikingen din.
translations.sv: Du irriterar din bror med ditt skrikande.
translations.ro: Îți enervezi fratele cu țipetele tale.
translations.da: Du irriterer din bror med dine råb.
translations.ja: あなたは叫ぶことで弟をいらだたせている。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun (2nd person singular), informal.
Finite verb (présent de l'indicatif, 2nd person singular) with 'Tu' as subject.
Possessive determiner (2nd person singular, masculine singular) modifying 'frère'.
Common noun (masculine singular) functioning as the direct object of 'irrites'.
Preposition introducing an instrumental/comitative complement.
Possessive determiner (2nd person singular, plural form) modifying 'cris'.
Common noun (masculine plural) governed by the preposition 'avec'.

sentences.target: Le pollen irrite mes yeux en été.
sentences.reading: /lə pɔ.lɛn i.ʁit me zjø ɑ̃ ete/

translations.fr: Le pollen irrite mes yeux en été.
translations.ipa: /lə pɔ.lɛn i.ʁit me zjø ɑ̃ ete/
translations.en: Pollen irritates my eyes in summer.
translations.es: El polen me irrita los ojos en verano.
translations.de: Pollen reizt meine Augen im Sommer.
translations.it: Il polline mi irrita gli occhi in estate.
translations.zh-Hans: 夏天花粉会刺激我的眼睛。
translations.yue: 夏天花粉會刺激我對眼。
translations.pt: O pólen irrita meus olhos no verão.
translations.he: אבקת פרחים מגרה לי את העיניים בקיץ.
translations.vi: Vào mùa hè, phấn hoa làm mắt tôi bị kích ứng.
translations.ar: حبوب اللقاح تهيج عينيّ في الصيف.
translations.nl: Stuifmeel irriteert mijn ogen in de zomer.
translations.hu: Nyáron a pollen irritálja a szememet.
translations.hi: गर्मियों में पराग मेरी आंखों में जलन करता है.
translations.pl: W lecie pyłki drażnią mi oczy.
translations.el: Η γύρη ερεθίζει τα μάτια μου το καλοκαίρι.
translations.nb: Pollen irriterer øynene mine om sommeren.
translations.id: Serbuk sari mengiritasi mata saya saat musim panas.
translations.sv: Pollen irriterar mina ögon på sommaren.
translations.cs: Pyl mi v létě dráždí oči.
translations.da: Pollen irriterer mine øjne om sommeren.
translations.ja: 夏は花粉で目が刺激される。

tokens.explanation: Definite article (masculine singular) introducing 'pollen'.
Common noun (masculine singular) functioning as the subject.
Finite verb (présent de l'indicatif, 3rd person singular) agreeing with 'Le pollen'.
Possessive determiner (1st person singular, plural form) modifying 'yeux'.
Common noun (masculine plural, irregular plural of 'œil') functioning as the direct object of 'irrite'.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement.
Common noun (masculine singular) expressing the time frame ('in summer').

sentences.target: Arrête d'irriter tout le monde, s'il te plaît.
sentences.reading: /aʁɛt di.ʁite tu lə mɔ̃d sil tə plɛ/

translations.fr: Arrête d'irriter tout le monde, s'il te plaît.
translations.ipa: /aʁɛt di.ʁite tu lə mɔ̃d sil tə plɛ/
translations.es: Deja de molestar a todo el mundo, por favor.
translations.de: Hör bitte auf, alle zu nerven.
translations.it: Smettila di infastidire tutti, per favore.
translations.pt: Por favor, pare de irritar todo mundo.
translations.vi: Làm ơn đừng làm mọi người khó chịu nữa.
translations.ar: من فضلك توقف عن إزعاج الجميع.
translations.nl: Hou alsjeblieft op met iedereen te irriteren.
translations.hi: कृपया सभी को परेशान करना बंद करो.
translations.el: Σε παρακαλώ, σταμάτα να ενοχλείς τους πάντες.
translations.nb: Vær så snill, slutt å irritere alle.
translations.ro: Te rog, încetează să-i enervezi pe toți.
translations.da: Hold venligst op med at irritere alle.
translations.ja: みんなをイライラさせるのはやめてください。

tokens.explanation: Imperative (2nd person singular) form of the verb, taking a 'de + infinitif' complement.
Infinitive verb introduced by elided preposition 'de' after 'arrêter de'; functions as the complement of 'Arrête'.
Quantifying determiner modifying 'le monde' in the idiom 'tout le monde' ('everyone').
Definite article introducing 'monde'.
Common noun; in 'tout le monde', the NP functions as the direct object meaning 'everyone'.
Conjunction 'si' ('if') elided before vowel, merged with the pronoun 'il'; part of the fixed polite formula 's'il te plaît'.
Clitic indirect object pronoun (2nd person singular) governed by 'plaît' in 'plaire à quelqu'un'.
Finite verb (présent de l'indicatif, 3rd person singular); in 's'il te plaît', expresses the polite request 'please'.
